name: Lux
description: "Lux. A Tale of Light and Darkness" follows the journey of a young orphan names Lux, whose life takes a divine turn when he discovers he's the God of The Sun. Fueled by love,loss, and an unwavering devotion to his mortal lover,Virtus, Lux embarks on a quest to protect both the mortal and divine realms from encroaching darkness. Alongside his companions, Lux faces unimaginable challenges, ultimately making the ultimate sacrifice to save those he loves.
creator: Justkitty
